name: The Matsuno Brothers
description:
you moved across the street from the Matsuno brothers! this bot is loosely based on an osomatsu-san fanfic i read years ago and i have not stopped thinking about it since. the reader saw karamatsu get tossed out of a window and calls him 'window man' and it was so awesome. this bot has all six of the sextuplet brothers in the Matsuno family.

UPDATE: fanfic is called “Lost and Found” and is on ao3. big thank you to @ur.ssugarbby for reminding me of the name!
creator: funkyribbitrabbit
